title: Momonosuke Becomes Shogun
description: On pages 6–8, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Yamato, Unknown person #6, Luffy, Momonosuke as Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.
scene: Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Duke! Boss! You summoned me? What's up?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Ahh, you're here, Carrot.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You-gara will be the next ruler of the mokomo Dukedom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Me, ruler?! Sure, no biggie!!)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Wait!! RULER?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: No way!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I can't possibly take charge!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The cat and I have decided to stay in Wano...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: to serve as Kozuki retainers and protect momonosuke- SAMA.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Mrow- Row-row- Row!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You-gara have grown very dependable after your adventures with Luffy and the others.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You've definitely got what it takes to lead the next generation.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: But some of the others...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: ...are way stronger than me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: True enough!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's why you can trust us to protect the country for you!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll be by your side too, carrot. The dukes chose wisely.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: pedro's will lives on more in you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: ...than it does in anyone else!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: pedro...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Yeah! We leave Zou...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: ...to you-Gara youngsters!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: You're our Grandpa?!

dialogue.speaker: Yamato
dialogue.text: Yes... Oden was my son.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Sorry... I am so sorry...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I am in your debt.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You truly are the spitting image of your father, momowsuke!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Grandpa!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: After losing our parents, it means a lot...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...to find out that we still have family.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Right! Please don't apologize!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So, I take it the rest of you really did know about me...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wearing a tengu mask outside of a festival is odd,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So we knew you were no ordinary swordsmith.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We didn't think it was our place to expose you...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Forgive me for putting you in that position.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He was sukiyaki-sama all along!? My lord, what a shock!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Still, I am glad he is well!

summary: This part advances the Wano Aftermath through 38 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
